description: Calculate medication refill schedules using date arithmetic and insurance timing. The spreadsheet must include columns for Days Supply, Refill Due Date, Insurance Allows Refill, Days Until Can Refill, Days Until Out, and ACTION NEEDED. Apply conditional formatting and sort the data by urgency.

natural_language.prompt: Help manage prescription medication refills by calculating when each medication will run out, when insurance allows refills, and flagging urgent medications that need immediate attention. Apply conditional formatting to highlight urgent items and sort by most urgent first.
